mapper.select:
SELECT hpp.id, hpp.title, hpp.picture, hpp.is_top, hpp.add_datetime, hpp.status, hpp.textbook_id, COALESCE(t.name, s.name) AS authorName, COALESCE(t_op.name, s_op.name) AS operatorName FROM home_page_promotion hpp LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u ON hpp.creator = u.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON u.id = t.user_id AND u.user_type IN (0, 2) LEFT JOIN student s ON u.id = s.user_id AND u.user_type = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u_op ON hpp.operator = u_op.id LEFT JOIN teacher t_op ON u_op.id = t_op.user_id AND u_op.user_type IN (0, 2) LEFT JOIN student s_op ON u_op.id = s_op.user_id AND u_op.user_type = 1
AND hpp.status = #{param.status}
AND hpp.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.title}, '%')
ORDER BY hpp.is_top DESC, hpp.add_datetime DESC

SELECT hpp.*, COALESCE(t.name, s.name) AS authorName, COALESCE(t_op.name, s_op.name) AS operatorName FROM home_page_promotion hpp LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u ON hpp.creator = u.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON u.id = t.user_id AND u.user_type IN (0, 2) LEFT JOIN student s ON u.id = s.user_id AND u.user_type = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u_op ON hpp.operator = u_op.id LEFT JOIN teacher t_op ON u_op.id = t_op.user_id AND u_op.user_type IN (0, 2) LEFT JOIN student s_op ON u_op.id = s_op.user_id AND u_op.user_type = 1
AND hpp.id = #{promotionId}
